name: Italian Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 1/4 cup lemon juice, 1/4 cup cider vinegar, and 1/4 cup unsweetened apple juice into a bowl.
2. Add 1/2 teaspoon oregano, 1/2 teaspoon dry mustard, 1/2 teaspoon onion powder, 1/2 teaspoon basil, 1/8 teaspoon thyme, and 1/8 teaspoon rosemary to the bowl.
3. Stir all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least an hour or two to allow the flavors to blend.
5. Before serving, remove any garlic cloves from the dressing.
6. The dressing will yield approximately 12 tablespoons.
